decisions.title: Prioritize E2 Performance Suite vs Sift Edge GUI Development
decisions.context: Multiple E2 performance issues (ENG-8960 CPU, ENG-8416 caching, ENG-6614 table cache) alongside new Edge GUI prototype (ENG-8854). Core user experience vs new platform capability.

arguments.for: E2 is production-critical; performance directly impacts Decisions Captured (North Star). Edge GUI can wait until core is stable.
arguments.against: Edge GUI enables 'Embed Deeper' pillar; delaying risks Q2 partner commitments. E2 issues are incremental improvements.

decisions.title: Commit to Canvas Launch Timeline or Pause for Algorithm Stability
decisions.context: Core algorithm work ongoing (ENG-9000 large-file skipping, ENG-8999 crate restructuring) while Canvas features need Family Config/Overview polish (ENG-8952, ENG-8951). Foundation vs features tension.
decisions.blockedBy: Core algorithm refactoring completion date unclear; impacts Canvas reliability guarantees

arguments.for: Canvas is 'Nail the Core' - ship with known issues, iterate. Delaying loses Q1 momentum and customer commitments.
arguments.against: Algorithm instability risks Canvas reputation at launch. Better to delay 2 weeks than ship unreliable product that undermines trust.

decisions.title: Allocate Dedicated Alerting/Observability Sprint vs Continuous Integration
decisions.context: 6 new alerting tickets (ENG-8975, 8976, 8979, 8980, 8986, 8873 API latency). Infrastructure health critical but no clear ownership pattern.

arguments.for: Dedicated sprint ensures comprehensive coverage, reduces future incidents. 'Build the Moat' requires operational excellence.
arguments.against: Pulls engineers from feature work; alerts can be added incrementally. Risk of over-engineering monitoring before product-market fit.

decisions.title: Standardize Python Rules Execution Model Before Beta
decisions.context: Bug with async job execution (ENG-9015), run alignment overrides broken. Python Rules is key 'Embed Deeper' capability but execution model unclear.

arguments.for: Fixing now prevents technical debt; Python Rules enables customer self-service (North Star driver).
arguments.against: Beta customers expect rapid iteration; perfecting execution model delays learning. Ship, learn, refactor.

timeAudit.weekSummary: 63% meeting load vs 40% target. 3 one-on-ones addressing blocked decisions. Zero deep work blocks >2hr.
alerts: 4 consecutive days with <2hr focus time - risk to Canvas architecture decision quality
Decision backlog grew 40% this week - ENG-9000 algorithm refactor blocking 7 downstream tickets
No strategic planning time allocated - March OKR reviews in 3 weeks
